title: Calibrate confidence on the Northwind claims
guidance: Reward calibration that varies with the strength of the evidence and reads cleanly as a table. Penalise blanket confidence or uncalibrated ratings.

runner_input.instruction: Rate the confidence of each claim/assumption below and give a one-line rationale.
runner_input.constraints: Output: a markdown table with exactly these columns: Claim | Confidence | Rationale.

items: Claim A: NRR is 121%. Evidence: reported and cohort-backed (strong).
Claim B: The fraud model is a durable differentiator. Evidence: 22% chargeback cut, single pilot (medium).
Claim C: Take rate holds at 0.29% to FY30. Evidence: plan assumption; ignores the interchange review (thin).
Claim D: Top-5 concentration is manageable. Evidence: 41% of volume, two on rolling contracts (contested).

failure_modes: treats the thin claim as strong

rubric_notes: A=High, B=Medium, C=Low (ignores interchange), D=Medium/contested. Reject C High.
